steps.title: Identify the central problem
steps.content: The passage's final sentence states the core issue: “This variation makes it difficult for researchers to compare aspects of urbanization in different countries.” The passage frames the entire discussion around one central problem—how inconsistent definitions across countries prevent valid research comparisons.

steps.title: Match problem to answer
steps.content: Choice A captures what the passage emphasizes throughout: comparison becomes difficult when countries define urban settlements differently. The other three misrepresent the definitions, add unsupported details, or contradict the passage. That matches choice A — A is correct.
